anchor_quote: non viene fornita alcuna informativa agli utenti ... l’assenza di idonea base giuridica ... il trattamento di dati personali ... risulta inesatto ... l’assenza di qualsivoglia verifica dell’età degli utenti
english_paraphrase: The order states that no privacy notice was provided to users/data subjects, that there was no suitable legal basis for training-related processing, that outputs could be inaccurate, and that no age-verification mechanism was present.

anchor_quote: Serco processes biometric data for the purpose of monitoring employee attendance. Facial recognition technology (FRT) is in use at all 38 Relevant Facilities.
english_paraphrase: The notice states that Serco used biometric systems, including facial recognition, for employee attendance monitoring across 38 facilities.
claim_use: Supports direct notice-text wording on workplace attendance-monitoring scope and scale.
caution_note: Keep the claim tied to the notice and avoid converting one case into a broader sector-prevalence statement.

anchor_quote: This Notice is in relation to contraventions of Articles 5(1)(a), 6 and 9 of the UK GDPR. ... Cease all processing of biometric data for the purpose of employment attendance checks ... anchor_quote: From at least August 2019 to August 2023, Delphia represented that it used artificial intelligence and machine learning to analyze its retail clients’ spending and social media data to inform its investment advice when, in fact, no such data was being used in its investment process.

caution_note: Keep settlement-order posture explicit; do not present the order as independent judicial fact-finding.
